wins_analysis: No wins today — zero orders were executed as all 3 pending orders remained unfilled. Entry prices were not reached during the session, indicating entry levels were set too conservatively or too far from market action in a fast-moving down day.
losses_analysis: No losses either, but the real failure is zero execution. In a -2.1% trending down day, the single aligned SHORT (ITC SELL at 283.00) likely gapped below the entry level at open or moved too fast to fill at the limit price. Counter-trend BUY setups (COALINDIA, ICICIBANK) were never going to reach demand zones in a strong selloff.
regime_impact: The strong trending_down regime (-2.1%, ADX 25) made BUY setups completely irrelevant — they should not have been placed. The regime favored supply zone shorts, but the strategy only identified 1 qualifying SHORT (ITC) and its entry was too tight for a gap-down open scenario. The regime hurt overall by limiting available setups while the system wasn't aggressive enough on the one valid short.

improvements.action: In trending_down regime (Nifty < -1%), strictly filter out ALL BUY/demand zone setups regardless of zone score. Do not place counter-trend orders.
improvements.reason: COALINDIA BUY and ICICIBANK BUY had 0% AI probability and were placed against a -2.1% regime — guaranteed non-execution or losses.

improvements.action: For SHORT setups on gap-down days, use market-on-open or VWAP-based entries instead of fixed limit prices. Alternatively, set entry 0.3-0.5% above prior close to catch the opening move.
improvements.reason: ITC SELL at 283.00 likely wasn't filled because price gapped below entry in the strong selloff. The short signal was correct but the limit order mechanism missed the move entirely.

improvements.action: Expand the scan universe or relax supply zone criteria slightly (e.g., min_score from current threshold down by 3-5 points) on strong trending days to find more regime-aligned setups. Target at least 5 SHORT candidates when ADX > 22 and Nifty < -1%.
improvements.reason: Only 1 SHORT setup out of Nifty 50 universe in a strong downtrend is too few. Broader scan would increase execution probability.

improvements.action: Add a pre-market gap check: if Nifty futures indicate > -1% gap-down by 9:00 AM, shift SHORT entry limits up by 0.5% from zone level to improve fill probability on opening drives.
improvements.reason: Today's zero execution on a high-conviction regime day represents a complete missed opportunity. Pre-market data would have signaled the gap.

improvements.action: Do not place orders with 0% AI probability under any circumstance. Set minimum AI probability threshold at 40% for order placement.
improvements.reason: COALINDIA and ICICIBANK both had 0% AI probability yet orders were placed anyway, wasting capital allocation slots.

tomorrow_focus: After a -2.1% Nifty drop, watch for either continuation shorts at supply zones (if VIX stays elevated and no reversal candle forms) or a dead-cat bounce into supply zones which would be ideal SHORT entries with tight stops.

symbol_notes.ITC: Correct SHORT thesis but entry missed — if price retraces toward 283-285 tomorrow, re-attempt short with wider entry tolerance
symbol_notes.COALINDIA: Avoid BUY until regime shifts — likely to test lower demand zones around 470-472 first
symbol_notes.ICICIBANK: Banking stocks weakest in selloffs — only consider SHORT on supply zone rallies, avoid BUY until Nifty stabilizes
